jsonLd.title: Fyers is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
